prompt: Create a vertical hero card with a title and body.
Add a primary call-to-action button under a short text line.
openui:
root = Stack([copy, cta], "vertical")
copy = Text(":copy.line")
cta = Button(":cta.label")

prompt: Stack two cards vertically for a feature section.
openui:
root = Stack([a, b], "vertical", 8)
a = Card(":feat.a.title", ":feat.a.body")
b = Card(":feat.b.title", ":feat.b.body")

root = Stack([primary, secondary], "horizontal", 4)
primary = Button(":actions.primary")
secondary = Button(":actions.secondary")

prompt: Nested stack with title text, body text, and a button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, body, action], "vertical")
title = Text(":panel.title")
body = Text(":panel.body")
action = Button(":panel.action")

prompt: Pricing card with title, body, and subscribe button.
openui:
root = Stack([plan, subscribe], "vertical")
plan = Card(":pricing.title", ":pricing.body")
subscribe = Button(":pricing.cta")

prompt: Page header text above a card.
openui:
root = Stack([header, main], "vertical")
header = Text(":header.title")
main = Card(":main.title", ":main.body")
